evals.prompt: Scrape 50 VP Marketing leads at US SaaS companies (50-500 employees) using the audience list 'lgj-scraped-us-saas-vp-marketing'. Import them to Turso.
evals.expected_output: GET /lists resolves or POST /lists creates the named list; POST /leads/search is called with {titles, industries, countries, empMin, empMax, emailStatus, excludeListId, size: 100} and paginated until target reached; leads.json written to .claude/skills/consulti-scrape-workspace/{run-id}/; emails added via POST /lists/{id}/add-leads; scripts/import-leads.sh - consulti ingests via stdin with jq-transformed shape; final summary reports list_id, scraped count, imported count; user prompted to run /email-verification next.

evals.prompt: Pull 25 marketing agencies in Florida from the Consulti local-business database. Track them under the list 'lgj-scraped-fl-marketing-agencies'.
evals.expected_output: POST /local-leads/search called with {states: ['FL'], keywords: ['marketing agency']}; Turso queried for prior google_place_id values where source_actor='consulti' and results filtered client-side (no excludeListId on this endpoint); businessIds (not emails) added via POST /lists/{id}/add-leads; filtered JSON imported via scripts/import-leads.sh - consulti; summary notes local-leads path and client-side dedup.

evals.prompt: Scrape 20 business podcasts with verified emails and track them under 'lgj-scraped-business-podcasts'.
evals.expected_output: POST /creator-leads/search called with {source: 'podcast', categories: ['Business'], hasEmail: true}; Turso queried for prior emails where source_actor='consulti' and results filtered client-side; emails added via POST /lists/{id}/add-leads; imported via scripts/import-leads.sh - consulti; summary notes creator-leads path and email-based client-side dedup.
